title: zoli2D's Subnautica
description: A fan-made mod about a game named Subnautica
body:
Installation Requirements

Requires: GeckoLib
Optional: Better Diving

About

The purpose of the mod is to play our favorite game in the world of Subnautica. The story of the original game/games is not included. But there will be references to it. And the world is randomly generated. The mod is 1.16.5, so the underground biomes are on the surface. To reach 4546B, you need to craft the Notch Rocket! It can be done with copper and titanium which are now generate in the overworld! The recipes are based on the original game. The recipes can be found on our wiki.

Content

- 16 biomes
- 11 carnivores
- 18 herbivores
- 4 + 1 leviathans
- 2 vehicle
- Modules
- Seaglide
- Plants
- Ores
- Decoration blocks
- Functional blocks
- Builder Tool (WIP)
- Decoration and Functional items.

Dev Plan

1. Subnautica (Original Game around 80-90%)
2. Subnautica Community (Mods, Ideas, etc...)
3. Below Zero (Around 80-90%)
4. Below Zero Community (Mods, Ideas, etc...)
(Maybe) 5. Architects' Planet in my fantasy

Permissions

- You can use the mod in modpack
- Don't upload it to another mod sites!
- If you're makeing a video about it, please place the CurseForge link into the description!
